query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paid_orders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isVoided = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as voided_orders,
  ROUND(SUM(courseAmount), 2) as total_course_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN paymentDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_payment_date,
  SUM(CASE WHEN paymentDate IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_payment_date
FROM orders;

SELECT orderNo, customerName, courseAmount, paymentDate, status, isVoided
FROM orders
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 5;
